notableEvents.label: Zack Gelof GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Zack Gelof grounds into a double play, third baseman Nick Allen to second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker. Henry Bolte out at 2nd. Zack Gelof out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Soderstrom GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Soderstrom grounds into a double play, shortstop Jeremy Peña to first baseman Christian Walker. Nick Kurtz out at 2nd. Tyler Soderstrom out at 1st.
